Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant The Wm. Powell Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records Or Other Qualified Person(S) And Person(S) Most Qualified, And Documents, At Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCE:
Douglas V. Dukelow, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff David Prince's motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable of defendant William Powell Company is granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition and specifying the scope of the deposition. Deposition to be completed by February 1, 2008. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
